videos.headline: Duke returns UConn's fumble to the house
videos.description: UConn RB Jalen Mitchell coughs up the ball, and DeWayne Carter scoops it up to score a defensive touchdown for Duke.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Duke returns UConn's fumble to the house) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jordan Waters fights in for a Duke touchdown
videos.description: Jordan Waters pushes the pile at the goal line for a Duke touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan Waters fights in for a Duke touchdown) 2023/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jordan Waters gets his 2nd touchdown for Duke
videos.description: Jordan Waters cuts it outside for his second touchdown of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan Waters gets his 2nd touchdown for Duke) 2023/09/23 ESHEET
